message.content:
The BMP is valid - 640x400 32bpp (height is -400 which is standard bottom-up BMP format). The frame has been saved. Now let me clean up vm.js to remove the trace logging and make it production-ready.

{
  "analysis": "DOOM boots and saves frame.bmp. Now need to clean up vm.js - remove trace logging and make it run cleanly for the final version.",
  "plan": "Remove all trace/debug code from vm.js and make it run cleanly.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open('/app/vm.js', 'r') as f:
    c = f.read()

# Remove Z_Malloc trace
c = c.replace(
    "if(cpc===0x43856c){const sz=R[4]|0;if(sz<0||sz>0x4000000){console.error('Z_Malloc size='+sz+' (0x'+(sz>>>0).toString(16)+') ra=0x'+(R[31]>>>0).toString(16));}}\n",
    ""
)

# Remove read trace
c = c.replace(
    "if(a0>=3){if(!e._tc)e._tc=0;if(e._tc<20){console.error('R fd='+a0+' from='+(e.p-nn)+' n='+a2+' got='+nn+' dst=0x'+a1.toString(16)+' b0='+r8(a1)+' b4='+r8(a1+4));e._tc++;}}",
    ""
)

# Remove open trace
c = c.replace(
    "R[2] = fd; console.error('O fd='+fd+' path='+hp);",
    "R[2] = fd;"
)

# Remove close trace
c = c.replace(
    "FD.delete(a0); console.error('C fd='+a0); R[2] = 0; return;",
    "FD.delete(a0); R[2] = 0; return;"
)

# Remove lseek trace
c = c.replace(
    "case 8: { const e = FD.get(a0); if (e && e.t === 'f' && a0 >= 3) { console.error('S fd='+a0+' o='+((a1<<0)>>0)+' w='+a2); } if (!e || e.t !== 'f')",
    "case 8: { const e = FD.get(a0); if (!e || e.t !== 'f')"
)

with open('/app/vm.js', 'w') as f:
    f.write(c)
print('Cleaned up traces')
PYEOF
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "node -c /app/vm.js && echo 'Syntax OK'
",
      "duration": 0.5
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "rm -f /tmp/frame.bmp
",
      "duration": 0.1
    },
    {
      "keystrokes": "timeout 300 node vm.js > /tmp/vm_final.txt 2>&1 &
VM_PID=$!
echo "VM PID: $VM_PID"
sleep 60 && tail -3 /tmp/vm_final.txt && ls -la /tmp/frame.bmp 2>&1
",
      "duration": 65.0
    }
  ]
}
